title: Battle of Hoth (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Hoth''' may refer to one of the following:

==In-universe==
===[[Canon]]===
*[[Battle of Hoth]], a battle that took place in [[3 ABY]].
*[[Battle of Hoth (Iron Blockade)]], a battle that took place during the [[Iron Blockade]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]] in [[4 ABY]]

===[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]===
Several battles have taken place on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]:

*'''[[Great Galactic War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Hoth (Great Galactic War)|Battle of Hoth]] ([[3665 BBY]])
*'''[[Galactic War]]'''
:*[[Battle of High Ridge]]
:*[[Battle of Hoth (Galactic War)|Battle of Hoth]] ([[3642 BBY]])
*'''[[New Sith Wars]]'''
:*[[Battle of Hoth (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Hoth]] ([[1004 BBY]])
*'''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''
:*[[Skirmish on Hoth]] ([[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]])
*'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Hoth (0 BBY)|Battle of Hoth]] ([[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]])
:*[[Battle of Hoth (1 BBY)|Battle of Hoth]] ([[0 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]])
:*[[Battle of Hoth (2 ABY)|Battle of Hoth]] ([[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]])
:*[[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] ([[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]])
:*[[Battle for the Darksaber]]

==Out-of-universe==
*[[The Battle of Hoth (Star Wars: The Card Game)|''The Battle of Hoth'']], an expansion pack of ''[[Star Wars: The Card Game]]''
*[[The Battle of Hoth (game)|''The Battle of Hoth'']], a game published in [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]]
*[[The Battle of Hoth (illustration)|''The Battle of Hoth'']], an illustration in [[Star Wars Insider 29|''Star Wars Insider'' 29]]
*''The Battle of Hoth'', a track from [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back Original Soundtrack|''The Empire Strikes Back'' soundtrack]]
*"[[Battle of Hoth (episode)|Battle of Hoth]]," an episode of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures]]''
*"[[The Battle of Hoth (short story)|The Battle of Hoth]]," a short story in [[5-Minute Star Wars Stories|''5-Minute Star Wars Stories'']]
